title: Shillong、Meghalaya — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Shillong、Meghalaya的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Shillong是Meghalaya的一个城市，人口约450,000。The capital of Meghalaya, known as the Scotland of the East for its rolling hills, waterfalls, and pleasant year-round climate.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
